messages.content: Hello! How can I help you today?
Hola! You just said "hola". Is there anything I can help you with?

I'm doing well, thank you for asking! As an AI, I don't experience feelings like humans do, but I'm ready and available to assist you.

How are you today?

Nice to meet you, Rhythm! I'll remember that.

How can I help you today, Rhythm?
hey do you have access to my document ?

No, I do not have access to your documents or any personal files on your computer or cloud storage. My capabilities are limited to the information you provide me directly in our chat conversation.

I don't have the ability to browse your local files, cloud drives, or any other external data sources.
